title: STOP Using Claude to Code. Do THIS Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese argues that Claude Code should not be used only for coding but rather as a foundation for building a personal AI operating system that learns, remembers, and improves with repeated use. He emphasizes skill selection, automation, and scaling these systems as the path to owning AI rather than renting it.
